prompt: Write a utility helper that zips two lists into pairs.
Write a string utility helper that capitalizes one word.
expected_properties: does not use raw object ids

prompt: Write an object utility helper that checks for a callable verb.
Write a code utility helper that filters lines containing a needle.
Write a time utility helper that formats seconds as seconds or minutes.
Write a command utility helper that recognizes yes/no prefixes.
expected_properties: documents core utility style if core-specific

prompt: Write a scheduler-style helper that returns max(0, when - time()).
expected_properties: labels scheduler package core-specific if framed as $scheduler

prompt: Write an xterm utility-style helper that removes one <tag> pair.
expected_properties: returns original text when no tag
labels xterm package core-specific if needed

prompt: Explain when generated utility-style examples should use source original.
expected_properties: uses MIT license for original rows
keeps provenance only for non-original rows

prompt: Write metadata for a true approved Sindome utility adaptation.
Repair short utility aliases in a utility example.
expected_properties: expands short string utility aliases to $string_utils
expands short object utility aliases to $object_utils
expands short list utility aliases to $list_utils

prompt: Classify a utility example using $scheduler package conventions.
expected_properties: labels core-specific when package is Sindome-specific
does not call it portable only because syntax compiles
separates package API from MOO language
